The code matches the descriptions: autogenerated, minimal, with source map references, no malicious content.\n\n---\n\n### Errors, Flaws, or Mistakes in the Reports\n\n**Strengths:**  \n- The reports are consistent, thorough, and accurate in identifying these files as benign, autogenerated artifacts.  \n- They correctly interpret the purpose of source map comments and the lack of runtime logic.\n\n**Potential flaws:**  \n- The reports do not consider the possibility of these files being used maliciously if, for example, they were injected or replaced unexpectedly.
